reviews.review_description: In the game it tells you to pick up a disc and put it into the system and I had to struggle to get the disc I had to go in and change my boundary settings and pretend that my floor level was at knee level so that I was able to reach the disc after that it tells you to put the disc into the game system but the disc would not go in the only things you can interact with in that room are the disc and what looks to be a book or a disk sleeve, that's it .
Nice game nice graphics. Nice concept for vr game. Feel retro platformer game vibe in vr mode full of action
